headline: Broadcom’s OpenAI Chip Deal Puts AI Growth And Valuation In Focus
summary: Broadcom and OpenAI have entered a multiyear partnership to co develop custom AI accelerators. The agreement positions Broadcom as a key supplier of bespoke chips tailored for OpenAI's advanced AI workloads. The move reflects OpenAI's shift away from relying only on Nvidia GPUs toward custom silicon. For investors watching NasdaqGS:AVGO, this new agreement puts fresh attention on Broadcom's role in AI infrastructure. The stock trades at $318.81, with a 1 year return of 79.3%, a 3 year gain...
